name: echotrace
description: Your Video Archive Search Engine - Find any moment in seconds, not hours

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:core" "npm run dev:worker" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dev:desktop: cd apps/desktop && npm run tauri dev
scripts.build: cd apps/desktop && npm run tauri build
scripts.setup:core: cd apps/core && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/pip install -r requirements.txt --extra-index-url https://pypi.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/simple
scripts.setup: npm run setup:core && npm run setup:desktop
scripts.clean: rm -rf apps/core/.venv apps/core/logs apps/desktop/node_modules apps/desktop/logs apps/desktop/src-tauri/target

author: EchoTrace Team
